violations.text: Establishment does not have a written list of ingredients for pastries on display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

The hand-washing/3 bay sink in the back storage area was blocked by trash and cart. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
Inspector observed handwashing sink lacking a splash guard next to food prep area to prevent contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
Inspector observed RTE apples on display. RTE foods must be protected from contamination by consumers. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
